scanner_decision.reason: M2-G/M2-J4 route table logic counted missing visible route-body guard signals and does not fully recognize M2-J2 app.use middleware coverage or deferred local-only/review-only semantics.
scanner_decision.recommended_update_scope: Update the audit scanner only, not runtime, to detect protected-route-authority middleware path patterns and classify remaining routes into true_gap, deferred_local_only, review_output_only, existing_gate_covered, or false_positive.

closeout_decision.reason: M2-J5 classification reduced ambiguity but still leaves true gap candidates requiring either exact route-body proof or a narrow M2-J6 coverage/false-positive classification before closeout.
closeout_decision.next_step: M2-J6 — Remaining Route Body Proof Scan and Final Guard Gap Decision

routes.m2j5_recommended_action: Classify as draft_only/review_only if it only drafts; patch if it sends/mutates CRM/ticket state.
